.. _requirements:

Requirements
============

Operating Systems
-----------------

Windows
''''''''
SimNIBS has been tested on 64 bit Windows 11


Linux
''''''
SimNIBS has been tested on CentOS 9 as well as Ubuntu 22.04 running under Windows 11 wsl2


MacOS
''''''
SimNIBS has been tested on MacOS 14.6 (Sonoma) and 15.3 (Sequoia)


Hardware
--------

  * 4 GB disk space
  * 8 GB of memory, but 16 GB strongly recommended
